CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-26-2025 CONTINUED TO JAN-21-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY ALVARADO'S UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. MOVING PARTY ANTHONY ALVARADO SHALL FILE THE PLEADING ATTACHED AS EXHIBIT 1 TO THE BOLING DECLARATION, WITH THE CAPTION CORRECTED TO STATE "FIRST AMENDED UNVERIFIED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES" WITHIN TWO WEEKS OF THIS ORDER. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)
